message:
feat(workflows): add StableTail wait condition

Add new WaitCondition variant for waiting until pane output stops
changing for a specified duration. This is useful for detecting
when a command has finished producing output.

Changes:
- Add StableTail variant with pane_id and stable_for_ms fields
- Add stable_tail() and stable_tail_on() constructors
- Include StableTail in pane_id() getter match arm
- Document in WaitCondition enum-level docs

StableTail differs from PaneIdle:
- PaneIdle: No new output for threshold
- StableTail: Output exists but tail content unchanged for duration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
